theme_strategy.rationale: A romantic, deeply cinematic experience requires a moody 'Luxury Romantic' theme. Using a deep crimson-black background rather than flat black creates an intimate, velvety atmosphere where glowing red and rose-gold elements can pop beautifully.

headings.rationale: Cormorant Garamond provides an elegant, sweeping, and profoundly romantic aesthetic reminiscent of classic love letters and luxury editorial.

body.rationale: A clean, modern geometric sans-serif to contrast the classic serif, ensuring legibility while maintaining a soft, approachable feel.

special.rationale: Used explicitly for the engraved 'A & S' logo and signature moments in the acceptance love letter.

rules: NEVER use pure #000000 or #FFFFFF. Use the rose-tinted off-white (#FBE8E9) for text.
Text in the acceptance letter MUST be colorful (gradients of rose gold, pink, and vibrant red), absolutely NO plain white text.
Background should be a deep velvet burgundy-black (#0C0507).

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use High-end Glassmorphism for the Proposal Cards: backdrop-blur-2xl, bg-black/40, with a delicate 1px inner border of border-rose-500/20.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise/grain overlay across the entire site to remove the 'digital' feel and make it feel like cinematic film.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Heart motifs subtly integrated into button shapes, masking for images, and floating particles.
visual_enhancers.glows: Soft drop-shadow glows around the main Heart and the YES button (e.g., drop-shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(225,29,72,0.6)]).

components.HeartHero: A massive, beautiful beating heart center-screen on load. Uses a glowing red gradient. Engraved 'A & S' in cursive font inside. Must have a heartbeat scale animation. On click, it triggers a dramatic Framer Motion layout shift/scale-up revealing the proposal.
components.ProposalCard: Glassmorphism card that contains the 'love story' paragraph. Immersive, layered above the background.
components.PhotoSlider: Auto-rotating carousel on a 10s timer (use Framer Motion AnimatePresence). Each slide contains a photo of Shree and a romantic compliment overlaid at the bottom.
components.ActionButtons: YES button: Pulses gently, prominent, bright vibrant red/pink gradient. NO button: Uses onMouseEnter event combined with Framer Motion to randomly set x/y translation boundaries so it literally dodges the cursor playfully and can never be clicked.
components.CelebrationScreen: Triggered after YES. Triggers 'react-confetti' (customized to heart shapes if possible, or red/pink/gold colors). Shows the vibrant colorful love letter.
components.InstagramMessenger: A sleek, glass-styled textarea input. 'Send Message' button opens Instagram DM using `window.open('https://ig.me/m/anuragchoudhary_02', '_blank')` and utilizes `navigator.clipboard.writeText()` to copy the message so she can easily paste it.

grids_and_layouts.hero: h-screen w-full flex items-center justify-center relative overflow-hidden
grids_and_layouts.card_layout: Max-width of 2xl, generously padded (p-8 md:p-12), centered, layered over a blurred animated background.
grids_and_layouts.photo_slider: Aspect ratio 3/4 or 4/5 for portraits. Rounded-2xl or masked into a subtle heart/arch shape.

motion.hero_heartbeat: Infinite scale sequence [1, 1.05, 1, 1] with easeInOut to mimic a real pulse.
motion.card_reveal: Initial y: 50, opacity: 0, scale: 0.9. Animate to y: 0, opacity: 1, scale: 1 with a spring transition (stiffness: 100, damping: 20).
motion.evasive_button: Framer motion `animate={{ x: noBtnPosition.x, y: noBtnPosition.y }}` updated on mouse hover.
motion.slider_transition: Slide in from right, exit to left, subtle scale down on exit.

media.audio: Embed a hidden YouTube iframe. Love Story (Taylor Swift): `https://www.youtube.com/embed/8xg3vE8Ie_E?autoplay=1&loop=1&enablejsapi=1`. On 'Yes', switch src to another romantic song (e.g., Perfect by Ed Sheeran `https://www.youtube.com/embed/2Vv-BfVoq4g?autoplay=1`). Note: Browsers require user interaction to autoplay audio, which perfectly aligns with the 'Click the Heart to open' action!

shree_photo_placeholders.description: Beautiful woman smiling at sunset (Placeholder for Shree)
Woman frolics in golden hour field (Placeholder for Shree)

background_elements.description: Red rose bloom falling dark background

accessibility.contrast: Ensure the rose-tinted text on the dark burgundy background passes APCA readability tests. Avoid extremely thin font weights for the body text.
accessibility.motion: Respect `prefers-reduced-motion` for the evasive button—if reduced motion is enabled, maybe just disable the NO button entirely or fade it out, rather than darting around.
accessibility.audio: Ensure there is a subtle, elegant volume/mute toggle visible somewhere in a corner so she can control the music if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: `yarn add framer-motion react-confetti lucide-react`.
CRITICAL: Do NOT use standard flat black (#000) or pure white (#fff). Use the defined rich burgundy/rose-gold palette.
CRITICAL: The Acceptance love letter text MUST be vibrant and colorful (e.g., using a text-transparent bg-clip-text gradient of pink, gold, and red), strictly no plain white.
CRITICAL: The NO button must never disappear. It must use a hover event to calculate a new random X/Y coordinate within a constrained radius and animate there smoothly.
CRITICAL: Implement the Audio player creatively. Since autoplay requires a user gesture, initialize/play the YouTube hidden iframe exactly when she clicks the main 'A & S' Heart on the first screen.

CRITICAL: Instagram feature must use `navigator.clipboard.writeText(message)` followed by `window.open('https://ig.me/m/anuragchoudhary_02', '_blank')` so she can paste the message immediately in the app.
CRITICAL: Remove all 'Made with Emergent' branding.
Apply heart motifs natively using SVGs. The main hero heart should be a beautifully crafted SVG with a gradient fill and a drop-shadow glow.
Do not build generic Shadcn cards. Use raw HTML/Tailwind to build custom, highly artistic glassmorphism cards as per the E1 anti-pattern rules.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make it extremely beautiful, romantic, and cinematic.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy (e.g., background rose imagery, grain overlay, glassmorphism cards).
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur, high saturation) for the proposal cards.
You MUST NOT apply universal transitions like `transition: all`.
NEVER use complete transparent backgrounds under text. Use a dark scrim or glassmorphism.
No emojis as icons. Use lucide-react icons if needed (e.g., for the mute button or send icon).
Always use optical alignment over geometrical alignment.
